content.en:
"The second-order gate has been damaged a little, if you want to repair it, it will take a long time, before it is repaired, we can't transform the holy realm world, and the transformation of the sacred realm heaven and earth must be based on the second-order gate. The White Turtle True Emperor said angrily.

"There's no way, this catastrophe can't completely occupy the holy realm, we can only wait for the next catastrophe!"

Another third-level Supreme True Emperor said helplessly.

In short, the Blood Mist Alliance miscalculated this time.

Originally, they thought that with just one holy realm heaven and earth, there were not many strong people, plus the threat to other foreign forces, they could completely destroy the three holy sects in the holy realm heaven and earth, once the three holy sects were destroyed, and then radiate the entire holy realm with a supreme treasure, and find and kill all the hidden holy beasts.

Then, they began to transform the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, constantly expanding the Blood Mist Forbidden Land, spreading countless territories.

Although this catastrophe can't completely transform the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, it can at least transform a small half.

Once a small part of the transformation is made, it can resist the rules of the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth and control some of the authority.

At that time, during the non-tribulation period, the True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance could all enter the Sacred Heaven and Earth, and would not be wiped out by the Sacred Heaven and Earth.

In that case, the Sanctuary Heaven and Earth would fall into their hands.

But now, all of this has been destroyed.

Of course, they can still carry out this plan again in the next catastrophe, and it is guaranteed to be completed perfectly, but delaying the cycle of a catastrophe is a huge loss for the Blood Mist Alliance.

Once the White Turtle True Emperor returns, he will definitely be punished by the leader of the Blood Mist Alliance.

"Forget it, it's come to this, it will take a long time to repair the second-order gate, and we can't repair it during this tribulation of the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth!"

......

Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

Ye Tian was still a little surprised at the moment, the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast was able to possess such a means, dismantling the plan of the Blood Mist Alliance with his own life, and killing many of the strongest True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance.

He could feel that if the Ten Thousand Thousand Sacred Beast attacked him, his copy body would also be annihilated in an instant.

After all, his copy body was a creature of the Dark Forbidden Realm, and once the power of the Tribulation subsided, he would also be wiped out by the rules of the Holy Realm.

If I also master this method, then in the Dark Forbidden Realm, I will really not be afraid of other foreign forces at all.

Immediately, Ye Tian wanted to trade this secret technique with the few supreme holy beasts that survived from the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, but it was a pity that the other supreme holy beasts of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect did not have this secret technique at all, and they didn't even know that the Ten Thousand Thousand Beasts Holy Beasts had such a secret technique.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only give up.

The Blood Mist Alliance suffered heavy losses, and the powerhouses of those foreign forces came back one after another, continuing to search for the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal in the Sacred Realm.

Ye Tian returned to the Haitian Holy Sect, although this place was turned into ruins, and all the disciples of the Haitian Holy Sect had fallen, he didn't care about these either.

He re-established the base, arranged the formation, and established a holy sect again with the Heyuan Holy Beast as the mainstay, no longer in the name of the Haitian Holy Sect, but named the Xuanxu Holy Sect.

In the blink of an eye, some years have passed.

At this time, the catastrophe of the Holy Land Heaven and Earth had finally passed.

Before the catastrophe passed, those foreign powerhouses left one after another, left the holy world through the door, and returned to their own foreign world, otherwise if they left late, they would be accidentally wiped out by the holy world, and they would really die.

-----------------

Ye Tian's copy body returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm, and the clone Heyuan Holy Beast guarded the Xuanxu Holy Sect, and also guarded the forbidden land, guarding this gate.

On the other side, the sea and sky forbidden land in the dark forbidden domain was also managed by the Terrans again, and a large number of Terran powerhouses guarded here, and this place was also transformed into a forbidden land suitable for Terran cultivation.

Soon after, the fifth Dark Calendar of the Dark Forbidden Realm arrived, and the fifth Dark Sanctuary was born.

In other words, there are still four days left in the Dark Calendar, and the Dark Forbidden Realm will usher in a catastrophe.

For Ye Tian, the time of the four dark calendars was still a long time, and he had enough time to improve his strength.

With his ability and talent, it shouldn't be a problem to raise his strength to the third level of the Supreme Ancestor.

"For so long, I have been looking for one Ancestral Endowment after another, and every Primordial Ancestral Realm in the Dark Holy Land has an Ancestral Endowment race, plus the last time I went to the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, the duplicated body has also copied many, many Ancestral Endowments, and now these Ancestral Endowments are all fused, and I have also given birth to a lot of Ultimate Ancestral Endowments, but at present, I don't need to worry about the Ultimate Ancestral Endowment, it is time to create a Gate Supreme Ancestral Technique, and strive to step into the third level of the Supreme Ancestor. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took out a Sacred Heaven and Earth Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and began to comprehend the rules of the Sacred Heaven and Earth.

Then, his replica body began to burn the ancestral endowment, urging the derivation characteristics to deduce the ultimate ancestral technique of space, the Void Slash.

Void Slash used to be an ancestral skill, but after he fused many spatial ancestral endowments to form the ultimate spatial ancestral endowment, this ancestral technique was recently deduced by him to the level of the ultimate ancestral technique.

Therefore, he only needed to create another Void Slash that fit the rules of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, and he could try to fuse the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques Void Slash, and then he could merge into a Supreme Ancestral Technique Void Slash.

The progress of the Profound Ancestral Technique of Void Slashing is incomparably fast.

It didn't take long for the ancestral endowment of the replica body to burn out and completely crumble.

Then, Ye Tian spent some resources to condense the copy body again, and once again used the copy body to promote the derivation characteristics to create the ultimate ancestral technique void slash.

"It's a very fast speed, it took me ten realm years to create the ultimate ancestral technique, but it took almost a dark calendar time to fuse the two ultimate ancestral techniques and turn them into the strongest ancestral technique, although it was created by the Heyuan Holy Beast, the talent of the Heyuan Holy Beast is a little worse, but even if it is the ontology to create the fusion, it will take at least dozens of realm eras. And now, by sacrificing the body and urging the derivation characteristics again and again, I estimate that at most the time of one realm era, I can fuse the two ultimate ancestral techniques. Ye Tian said with full confidence.

In just a short period of time, the Ultimate Ancestral Technique that conformed to the rules of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth was created by Ye Tian.

Then, he began to fuse the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques, which was the big problem.

As the replicating body collapsed and annihilated again and again, and finally after being annihilated many times and consuming a lot of resources, almost a realm era had passed, and Ye Tian finally fused the two Ultimate Ancestral Techniques Void Slash and fused the Supreme Ancestral Technique Void Slash.

When the Xeon Ancestral Technique Void Slash was created, Ye Tian's physical body fused with the Xeon Ancestor Technique Void Slash, and a huge transformation occurred.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body transformed, and countless resources were turned into energy to promote the transformation of the physical body.

After a long time, Ye Tian's physical transformation was completed, and his strength became even stronger.

With the two Supreme Ancestral Skills, Ye Tian's current strength is probably very close to that of the third level of the Supreme Ancestor.
